security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:11434 https://api.g.alchemy.com https://*.g.alchemy.com; img-src 'self' asset: data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Private DeFi workstation — automate strategies and manage cross-chain assets locally.
bundle.longDescription: SHADOW Protocol is a privacy-first desktop application for DeFi automation. Build strategies, run automations, and manage your portfolio with local AI and human-in-the-loop approvals.
